case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. JAMES S TRUONG et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-18-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-18-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-18-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JUN-18-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUONG, JAMES S AN INDIVIDUAL $6,707.08 PRINCIPAL, $492.42 ATTORNEY FEES, $778.32 INTEREST, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,257.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
